block_20: Most Profitable Trade of the Week
block_46: The stock market got the titles of Bulls and Bears because of Spanish Caballeros in the state of California. Those Caballeros put California grizzlies in a fight with bulls. During such battles, bears used to swipe the enemy downward, while bulls hooked grizzlies upward, thus the analogy was born. Unfortunately, fierce fights led to the California grizzly’s extinction eventually.
